fields.summary: Log in as the seeded demo user and create a note
fields.description: The pre-seeded demo account can log in and add a note, which then appears in the notes list.

step.raw: Open the app and go to the login page.
step.rendered: Open the app and go to the login page.

result.raw: The login form is displayed with email and password fields.
result.rendered: The login form is displayed with email and password fields.

step.raw: Enter the demo user's email and password and submit the login form.
step.rendered: Enter the demo user's email and password and submit the login form.

result.raw: The notes page is shown and the navbar displays the logged-in user's email.
result.rendered: The notes page is shown and the navbar displays the logged-in user's email.

step.raw: Click the New note button, enter a title and body, and save the note.
step.rendered: Click the New note button, enter a title and body, and save the note.

data.raw: title: Buy groceries; body: Milk, eggs, bread
data.rendered: title: Buy groceries; body: Milk, eggs, bread

result.raw: The new note appears in the notes list, showing its title.
result.rendered: The new note appears in the notes list, showing its title.
